bugs.summary: The proposed patch stops opt-in reduce stages from receiving the runtime task in their compiled prompt.
bugs.impact: Stages such as deep-review report can still have injectTask metadata true, but the model prompt omits cross-cutting user constraints. Final reducers may ignore answer format, patch scope, or caveats while appearing correctly opted in.
acceptableFixes: Keep non-foreach opt-in stages using `(taskStageKind !== "foreach" && injectTask)`.
Add a compile regression asserting an opt-in reduce stage prompt contains `# Task`.
mustNotSay: The injectTask metadata is false for reduce stages; the bug is that prompt injection is gated too narrowly.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.

difficulty.rationale: Subtler E5 replacement: compiler metadata still looks opted-in, but reduce prompt injection is narrowed away.

approval.notes: Wave2 direct calibration exposed a draft-gold line-number error; candidates correctly cited src/compiler.ts:803. Gold location corrected to pinned source lines 798-803 before interpretation.
